name: Venison (Deer-elk-etc.) Swiss Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 slice Bacon, fry crisp and crumble
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge meat pieces in a mixture of salted flour, peppered flour, and dry mustard.
2. Brown the dredged pieces in bacon grease.
3. Place the meat in a covered casserole or crock pot.
4. Cover with a mixture of stewed tomatoes, chopped onion, carrot, beer, Worcestershire sauce, marjoram/thyme, beef bouillon, brown sugar, and salt and pepper to taste.
5. Add enough liquid (stock or water) so that the meat pieces are completely covered.
6. Bake at 300°F for 2½-3 hours until the meat is tender.
7. Remove the cover and continue baking until the sauce thickens.
